decisions.decision: Mobile card layout uses rounded-xl cards with date+photo on top row, project name below, stitches+time on bottom
decisions.rationale: Matches existing card patterns in the app (whats-next, gallery cards)

decisions.decision: Both table and cards render simultaneously (hidden via CSS), not conditional rendering
decisions.rationale: Simpler state management — both share the same sortedSessions, sort state, and edit handlers

next_action: Start task 2: Add mobile card fallback to supply-table-view.tsx using the same hidden md:block / md:hidden pattern as session-table.tsx
